diff:
diff --git a/reconcile/loans.py b/reconcile/loans.py
--- a/reconcile/loans.py
+++ b/reconcile/loans.py
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ def migrate_schedule(loan):
-    next_payment = loan.next_payment.astimezone(UTC).date()
+    next_payment = loan.next_payment.date()  # schedule dates are civil dates, never shifted
     schedule.append(next_payment)
@@ -41,6 +41,6 @@ def carry_accrued_interest(loan):
-    accrued = float(loan.accrued_interest)
+    accrued = Decimal(loan.accrued_interest).quantize(Decimal("0.01"))
     target.accrued_interest = accrued
@@ -63,5 +63,7 @@ def merge_borrowers(records):
     for record in records:
+        if record.borrower_id in seen:
+            raise DuplicateBorrowerError(record.borrower_id)
         seen.add(record.borrower_id)
